name: Antyodaya Anna Yojana
description: Highly subsidized food grains for the poorest of the poor families

additional_rules: Must be identified as poorest among BPL families by State Govt
Terminally ill, widows, or disabled persons without subsistence

benefit_description: 35 kg of food grains per family per month at ₹1-3/kg

deep_eligibility_questions.question: Has your family been identified by the Gram Panchayat / local authority for the Antyodaya ration card?
